STRAIGHT LINE MARKETING
The World’s Most Sophisticated Marketing System
Your Underground Playbook For Online Domination
Module 7: Looping Online
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 19 --

To understand and effectively apply this powerful
objection deflection strategy you must first have
your looping fundamentals nailed. You need to
understand the offline looping psychology to apply
this strategy online!
LOOPING
FUNDEMENTALS
WARNING
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 19 --

IT’S TIME TO APPLY IT ALL
ONLINE!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 19 --

YOUR PERFECT SLM FUNNEL
LEAD
CAPTURE SALES PG ORDER
FORM UPSELL UPSELL
(OPTIONAL)
DOWNSELL
(OPTIONAL)
DOWNSELL
(OPTIONAL)
THANK
YOU
FUNNEL FOLLOW UP
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 5 of 19 --

RETARGETING RECAP
1. AN INTERNET USER 2. VISITS YOUR SITE
YOUR SITE
3. LEAVES YOUR SITE
4. LATER, AS THEY BROWSE THE INTERNET, YOUR
AD WILL DISPLAY ON OTHER SITES
YOUR
RETARGETING
AD HERE
5.YOUR RETARGETING
AD CAPTURES THEIR INTERNET
6. THE
INTERNET
USER THEN
CONVERTS
INTO A LOYAL
CUSTOMER
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

STEPS TO
LOOPING ONLINE:
• Strategize
• Create Your Banner Ads
• Select A Retargeting Platform
• Create Campaign
• Analyze Results
• Scale Winners/Cut Losers
• Wash, Rinse, Repeat
